zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Briwere於1184年出生在英國素福爾可納易藍德時，她的父親William de Briwere II39歲，母親Beatrice de Vaux35歲。她於1198年之前與Fulbert De Dover Or Doure結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1233年6月10日之前在英國英格蘭戴文托爾巴易托爾華。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Briwere于1184年出生在英国素福爾可納易藍德时，她的父亲William de Briwere II39岁，母亲Beatrice de Vaux35岁。她于1198年之前与Fulbert De Dover Or Doure结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1233年6月10日之前在英国英格兰戴文托爾巴易托爾華。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Briwere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Pierre, Adrien, Aurele, Benedicte, Benoit, Colette, Fernand, Gaston, Marcel, Micheline.

French (Brière): topographic name from a regional variant of Old French bruiere ‘heather’ (see Bruyere ), or a habitational name from La Brière, the name of several places mainly in the northern part of France, from the same word.
History: Jean Brière from Clarbec in Calvados, France, married Jeanne Grandin in Quebec City, QC, in 1671.

variants.name: Bruyere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Fernand, Jacques, Marcel.

French (Bruyère): from Old French bruiere ‘heather’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived in a place where heather grew, or a habitational name from one of the places in France (for example in Calvados) named with this word. Compare Labruyere .
Altered form (Bruyère) of French Bruguier: habitational name from (Le) Bruguier, the name of several places in the southeastern part of France, a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Briwere was born in 1184, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, her father, William de Briwere II, was 39 and her mother, Beatrice de Vaux, was 35. She married Fulbert De Dover Or Doure before 1198. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died before 10 June 1233, in Torquay, Torbay, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Fulbert De Dover Or Doure avant 1198. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 10 juin 1233, à Torquay, Torbay, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Briwereが1184年にイギリススフォルクナイランドで生まれた時，父William de Briwere IIは39歳，母Beatrice de Vauxは35歳であった。1198年以前にFulbert De Dover Or Doureと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1233年6月10日以前にイギリスイギリスデボントルバイトルクアイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Briwere(이)가 1184년 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Briwere II(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice de Vaux(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1198년 이전 Fulbert De Dover Or Doure(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1233년 6월 10일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 토르베이 토르퀄이에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Briwere родилась в 1184 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Briwere II было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Vaux, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Fulbert De Dover Or Doure перед 1198 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 10 июнь 1233 г. в местности торкуеи, торбеи, девон, Англия, Великобритания.
